name: Boutmon

signature_move.name: Raigekishou
signature_move.description: Lands anaxe kickinto the opponent's skull with lightning.

description: A Digimon that evolved from the data of combat sport s such as karate . It is a courteous sportsman who has learned the rules of every type of martial arts, and values ​​fighting in the game format its opponent wants. Although Boutmon uses a wide variety of techniques, other than those from sports, non-existent techniques like those in fighting games also show up from time to time. Its Special Moves are landing an axe kick into the opponent's skull with lightning ( Raigekishou ), and firing oversized energy shots from its held-out palms ( Budenhadan ). In addition, it dishes out a series of kicking and punching techniques without giving the opponent a chance to strike back ( Jinrai Kaitengeki ).
